capabilities.justification: Loads the Lua 5.4 shared library via extern "C" declarations to call the Lua C API.
Calls Lua C API functions (lua_pushinteger, lua_gettable, luaL_setfuncs, etc.) through FFI.

justification: FFI bridge to Lua 5.4 runtime. Loads the Lua shared library and calls C API functions through raw extern "C" declarations.
